reference: My treatment for infertility is ongoing and I have polycystic ovary syndrome problem. Recently, the doctor gave me human chorionic gonadotropin injection and suggested that I take Duphaston for the first fifteen days and Metformin until I confirm my pregnancy. Can this help me achieve pregnancy? When should I check or diagnose my pregnancy?
text: My treatment for infertility is ongoing and I have polycystic ovary syndrome problem. Recently, the doctor gave me human chorionic bonadotropin injection and suggested that I take dufastin for the first 15 days and metformin until I confirm my pregnancy. Can this help me achieve pregnancy? When should I diagnose my pregnancy?
